name: CU Gate
description: Main entrance and security checkpoint of Covenant University.

name: CU Stadium
description: University sports stadium used for athletic events and ceremonies.

name: EIE Building
description: Electrical and Information Engineering faculty building. Houses 11 laboratories, 1 workshop, 3 classrooms and 46 offices.

name: Civil Engineering Building
description: College of Engineering — Civil Engineering. Houses 7 laboratories, 1 workshop, 4 classrooms and 26 offices.

name: Mechanical Engineering Building
description: College of Engineering — Mechanical Engineering. Houses 11 laboratories, 5 workshops, 3 classrooms and 40 offices.

name: ALDC Building
description: African Leadership Development Centre. Houses a 500-capacity conference hall with gallery, seminar room, two dining halls and a gymnasium.

name: CU Guest House
description: Official university guest accommodation with executive suites, mini-suites and standard rooms. Features two conference halls accommodating up to 300 guests.

name: Cafeteria 2
description: One of three strategically located cafeterias on campus serving both local and continental dishes for staff and students.

name: CUCRID Building
description: Centre for Research, Innovation and Discovery (CUCRID). A new generation research complex functioning as the hub of the University's research efforts.

name: Senate Building
description: Main administrative hub of the University. A six-floor building with penthouse, 26.9m high — the tallest on campus. Houses offices of Principal Officers and a Senate chamber seating 240 members.

name: Lecture Theatre
description: Two major air-conditioned lecture halls: Hall 1 seats 2,500 students and Hall 2 seats 1,400. Equipped with full multimedia teaching and learning facilities.

name: Diamond Bank
description: On-campus Diamond Bank branch and ATM services.

name: Petroleum and Chemical Building
description: Faculty of Petroleum and Chemical Engineering.

name: Zenith Bank / ICT Centre
description: On-campus Zenith Bank branch and university ICT support centre.

name: CST Building
description: College of Science and Technology. A three-storey complex with 25 lecture rooms, 17 science laboratories, 45 offices, 4 conference rooms and state-of-the-art computer laboratories with ~250 networked PCs.

name: CMSS / CLDS Building
description: College of Business and Social Sciences (CMSS) and College of Leadership Development Studies (CLDS). A three-storey ultra-modern structure with a total floor space of 12,748 m².

name: CEDS Building
description: Centre for Entrepreneurial Development Studies (CEDS). Houses 8 lecture rooms, 3 workshop spaces, a 150-capacity multipurpose hall and 19 office spaces.

name: Dorcas Hall
description: Female student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: CU Chapel
description: Covenant University Chapel — an ultra-modern architectural masterpiece seating 3,500. Houses the Chaplaincy, Directorate of Physical Planning and Development, and the Student Council offices.

name: Centre for Learning Resources (CLR)
description: University Library — an ultra-modern glass structure on three floors totalling 11,300 m². Accommodates ~2,500 readers and 500 staff and postgraduate students.

name: Eagle Square
description: Open recreational square and social gathering space.

name: Deborah Hall
description: Female student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Lydia Hall
description: Female student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Mary Hall
description: Female student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Joshua Hall
description: Male student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Peter Hall
description: Male student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: CU Medical Centre
description: Covenant University Medical Centre offering primary, secondary and certain tertiary health services. Strategically located close to the halls of residence for easy access.

name: Cafeteria 1
description: One of three strategically located cafeterias on campus serving both local and continental dishes for staff and students.

name: John Hall
description: Male student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Paul Hall
description: Male student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Joseph Hall
description: Male student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Daniel Hall
description: Male student residential hall. Includes common rooms, buttery, telephone room, beauty salon and administrative office.

name: Postgraduate Hall of Residence
description: Male and female postgraduate halls of residence. Two buildings of 4 floors each with 200 rooms per building, accommodating 400 students each. Serviced by a cafeteria accommodating 1,000–1,500 persons.
